Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Clara H. Barton
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system in the village of Dansville, county of Livingston, to Clara H. Barton.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to American Red Cross Founder Clara H. Barton
